hero.title: DISCORD BOT FOR EVERYTHING YOU NEED
hero.description: A powerful multi-tool bot with moderation, music, economy, leveling and premium add-ons for growing communities.

features.heading: EVERYTHING IN ONE BOT
features.subheading: Replace 10 bots with one. Built for power, designed for simplicity.

items.title: High Quality Music

items.title: Auto Moderation

items.description: Currency, shops, gambling, jobs and leaderboards to keep members engaged.

items.title: Leveling & XP
items.description: Voice and text XP with role rewards and rank cards your members will love.

items.title: Ticket Support
items.description: Beautiful ticket panels with transcripts, claiming and category routing.

items.title: Giveaways
items.description: Run giveaways with requirements, bonus entries and instant rerolls.

items.title: AI Chat
items.description: Built-in AI assistant for your members with custom personalities.

items.title: Full Dashboard
items.description: Configure every module from a sleek web dashboard, no commands required.

commands.heading: 120+ COMMANDS
commands.subheading: Browse slash commands for moderation, music, economy, and community tools.

items.desc: Play a song or playlist from any source
Ban a member from the server
Timeout a member for a set duration
Bulk delete messages in a channel

Try your luck at the casino

premium.heading: PREMIUM COMMANDS

items.desc: Unlock advanced filters, autoplay and queue controls.
Run longer AI replies with custom prompts and memory.
Enable branded ticket panels, routing rules and transcripts.
Track boosters, perks and higher XP rewards.

benefits: Priority support and faster response times
Higher rate limits for automation-heavy servers

cta.heading: READY TO LEVEL UP YOUR SERVER?
cta.description: Join over a million communities using EVa every day.

faq.heading: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know about EVa.

items.a: The core bot is free, with optional premium commands for servers that need higher limits and extra tooling.

items.q: How do I add EVa to my server?
items.a: Click the Add To Discord button, pick your server and authorize the requested permissions. You'll be up and running in under a minute.
Administrator is recommended for full functionality, but you can grant only the specific permissions you need for each module.

items.q: Can I configure modules per server?
items.a: Yes. Every module — moderation, leveling, economy, tickets — can be toggled and customized independently through commands.
All 120+ commands are available as slash commands with autocomplete and built-in help.
Join our support server linked in the footer. The team and community respond fast.

footer.description: The all-in-one Discord bot built for modern communities.
